title: A Good-By.
content:
For love of the roving foot
    And joy of the roving eye,
    God send you store of morrows fair
    And a good rest by and by!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Bliss Carman (William), titled "A Good-By.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
